home_subtitle: A simple 4:20 reminder and session timer app.
home_body: Time 420 helps you keep track of the 4:20 moment with daily reminders, a live countdown, and a short 4-minute-20-second session timer with ambient audio.
home_compliance: Time 420 does not sell cannabis or any controlled substances, does not facilitate purchases, and does not provide medical, legal, or treatment advice. The app is intended for adults in locations where related cultural references are legal and appropriate.
privacy_intro: Time 420 is a reminder and session timer app built around the 4:20 moment. This Privacy Policy explains how the app handles information when you use it.
privacy_s1:
Time 420 does not require you to create an account and we do not directly collect your name, email address, phone number, or login credentials.

The app may store preferences locally on your device, such as reminder settings, language preferences, sound preferences, haptic preferences, and theme preferences. These preferences are used only to provide the app's core functionality.
privacy_s2: Time 420 may ask permission to send local notifications so you can receive 4:20 reminders. You can enable or disable notifications at any time in your device settings.
privacy_s3:
Time 420 uses Google AdMob to display advertisements. Google and its partners may collect and use information such as device identifiers, advertising identifiers, usage data, and diagnostic information to provide, measure, and improve advertising.

This data may be used for third-party advertising and, where permitted by your consent and device settings, for tracking purposes across apps and websites.

You can learn more about how Google uses information from apps that use its services at: https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

You can manage ad personalization through your device settings and Google's advertising settings where available.
privacy_s4:
On iOS, Time 420 may request permission to track you across apps and websites owned by other companies for advertising purposes. If you deny permission, the app can still be used, but ads may be less personalized.

You can change this permission at any time in iOS Settings.
privacy_s5: Time 420's current app experience does not require users to record audio. If the app requests microphone access because of system or framework configuration, permission is controlled by iOS and can be denied or changed in device settings.
privacy_s6: Time 420 is intended for adults. The app is not directed to children and is not intended for users under the age rating shown on the App Store.
privacy_s7: Time 420 includes cultural references to 4:20. The app does not sell cannabis or any controlled substances, does not facilitate purchases, and does not provide medical, legal, or treatment advice.
privacy_s8: We do not sell personal information directly. Third-party advertising partners, such as Google AdMob, may process data as described in their own privacy policies and advertising technologies documentation.
privacy_s9: Local app preferences remain on your device unless you delete the app or clear app data. Data processed by third-party services is handled according to those services' policies.
privacy_s10_1: Disable notifications in your device settings.
privacy_s10_2: Limit or deny tracking permission on iOS.
privacy_s10_3: Reset or limit advertising identifiers in your device settings where available.
privacy_s10_4: Delete the app to remove locally stored app preferences.
privacy_s11: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a new effective date.
privacy_s12: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or Time 420, contact us at:
support_intro: Need help with Time 420? Contact us at:
support_a1: Make sure notifications are enabled for Time 420 in your device settings. You can also open the app settings and confirm that your 4:20 AM or 4:20 PM reminders are enabled.
support_q2: Can I use the app without tracking?
support_a2: Yes. If iOS asks for tracking permission, you can choose not to allow it. The app will continue to work, although ads may be less personalized.
support_q3: Does Time 420 sell cannabis or related products?
support_a3: No. Time 420 does not sell cannabis or any controlled substances and does not facilitate purchases. It is a cultural reminder and lifestyle timer app.
support_a4: No. Time 420 does not provide medical, treatment, legal, or health advice.
support_q5: How do I change language, sound, or haptic settings?
support_a5: Open the app settings and adjust your preferences from there.
support_contact: For support, feedback, or privacy questions, email:
age_body:
Time 420 is intended for adults.

The app includes cultural references to 4:20 and cannabis-related themes. It does not sell cannabis or any controlled substances, does not facilitate purchases, and does not provide medical, legal, or treatment advice.

Users should follow all local laws and regulations in their country, state, or region.

Time 420 includes advertising through third-party advertising partners. Ads should be appropriate for the app's age rating, but users may still control ad tracking and personalization through their device settings where available.
